MESSAGE FROM OUR FOUNDERS
Dear Valued Customers,
As  we  celebrate  45  years  of  success,  we  look  back  on  a  journey  defined  by  determination,  innovation,  and  an  unwavering  
commitment to excellence. From humble beginnings in 1980, Costex Tractor Parts (CTP) has grown into a global leader in heavy 
equipment replacement parts, serving over 150 countries with the same dedication that shaped our early days. What started as a 
bold vision and a passion for quality has evolved into a company that continuously sets new industry standards, staying true to our 
motto: “Quality with Value Guaranteed.”
Throughout the decades, we have expanded our facilities, optimized our operations, and embraced new technologies to better serve 
our customers. From opening our state-of-the-art headquarters to introducing cutting-edge product lines, every milestone reflects 
our relentless pursuit of excellence and innovation.
None of this would be possible without the trust and loyalty of our employees, customers, suppliers, and partners. Your support has 
been the driving force behind our growth, inspiring us to push boundaries and exceed expectations year after year.
As we look to the future, we remain committed to delivering top-quality parts, exceptional service, and groundbreaking solutions to 
meet the industry’s evolving demands. Thank you for being part of our journey—here’s to the next 45 years of success!
Sincerely,
Gilberto and Teresa Uribe

 
With gratitude,
Melissa Uribe-Gil
Executive Vice President
Costex Corporation
Dear Stakeholders,
As we celebrate 45 years in business, I am overwhelmed with gratitude. This milestone is not just about longevity—it is a 
testament to the collective dedication, resilience, and passion of our employees, customers, suppliers, and partners who 
have made this journey possible. From humble beginnings, Costex Tractor Parts (CTP) has grown into a global company, yet 
our core values remain unchanged: a deep commitment to quality, innovation, and service.
 
One of the greatest symbols of our progress is the opening of our state-of-the-art, solar-powered facility. More than just 
a  building,  it  represents  our  commitment  to  sustainability,  teamwork,  and  forward-thinking  innovation.  By  embracing  
environmentally friendly technology, we have taken a meaningful step toward reducing our carbon footprint while creating an 
inspiring space for our employees to grow and collaborate.
 
Over the years, CTP has evolved to better serve our customers. We now offer an expanded range of high-quality parts for the 
construction, marine, agriculture and mining industries, ensuring we remain competitive while delivering exceptional value. 
Beyond our business, we’ve found unique ways to connect with our communities and inspire future generations—whether 
through CTP University,  or our beloved mascot, Freddy the Filter, who helps us share our passion for building a better world.
 
As we look to the future, we remain committed to growth, innovation, and service. Our catalogue has doubled, our expanded 
Free  Trade  Zone  facility  enables  us  to  deliver  greater  savings  to  our  international  customers,  and  our  new  manufacturing  
facility  reinforces  our  belief  in  strengthening  domestic  production  while  expanding  the  reach  of  CTP  branded  products  
worldwide.  Innovationcontinues  to  drive  us  forward,  and  our  patent  department  is  helping  shape  the  future  of  CTP  with  
groundbreaking ideas.
 
This milestone is not just about looking back—it is about honoring our values as we move forward together. I invite you to 
visit our Mission, Vision, and Guiding Values, as they remain the foundation of everything we do. Thank you for being a part 
of our journey. Your support, trust, and dedication fuel our success, and we are deeply grateful.
 
Here’s to the next chapter in CTP’s story—one that we will continue to write with humility, passion, and purpose.

in our products and services
in our actions
 in our projects
 in our relationships
 in all we practice
 as our habit
OUR GUIDING VALUES
OUR MISSION
We innovate to build and uplift communities across the globe, communities that we have watched grow through 
our parts, services, and people. In the hands of the builders and producers of the world, one single part can help 
make a community whole, and one community can change the entire world. We exist to empower people from all 
walks of life to build their dreams piece by piece regardless of their means, because we are all part of the human 
family  that  strives  to  make,  innovate,  and  improve  the  world.  We  build  the  future  alongside  the  families  whose  
livelihoods depend on our success. We make heavy equipment accessible to the smallest operation in the farthest 
corner of the world.
As part of the company’s enduring mission, Costex strives to provide the best heavy equipment and engine parts 
on the market at competitive prices to its trusted customers in the construction, marine, and mining industries 
across  more  than  150  countries.  The  CTP  brand  takes  our  mission  to  heart  by  making  the  culture  at  Costex  
accessible  to  all,  promising  Quality  with  Value,  Guaranteed™  to  the  members  of  the  global  community  both  at  
home and abroad.
OUR VISION
To become a leader in the production and sale of heavy equipment parts by establishing a complete inventory of 
replacement parts segmented by a product line that will be readily accessible to all of our dealerships in the farthest 
reaches of the world, allowing us to bring innovative solutions to their daily challenges. Our goal is to live up to 
our ideals and showcase that we are a great company to work for by striving to create a working environment that 
inspires growth within our people. Costex will continue to foster sustainable innovation by remanufacturing heavy 
equipment  parts  and  using  solar  energy  to  support  the  construction,  marine,  and  mining  industries  worldwide.  
We will continue to make lasting contributions to the betterment of humanity for generations to come through our 
unwavering commitment to delivering Quality with Value, Guaranteed™.

NEW PRODUCTS
TO LOOK FOR...

1980
Costa Export is incorporated. Specializing in 
sourcing and selling replacement parts for 
heavy equipment.
CTP se incorpora como Costa Export 
especializada en la venta de partes de reemplazo 
para maquinaria pesada.
1982
1982
Costa Export changes its name to Costex 
Tractor Parts, a division of Costex Corporation.
Costa Export changes its name to Costex Tractor 
Parts, a division of Costex Corporation.
1987
Costex Tractor Parts moves to a 25,000
sq.ft. facility.
CTP se traslada a un establecimiento con más  
de 25.000 ft2.
1999
CTP shifted towards manufacturing, and 
introduced the CTP Gasket Line. At the same 
time, CTP’s facilities are expanded to over 
160,000 sq.ft.
CTP crea su propia línea de empaquetaduras. En 
el mismo año  extiende sus almacenes a
160.000 ft
2
.
1982
2005
CTP celebrates its 25th Anniversary.
CTP celebra su aniversario número 25.
2006
CTP is recognized as a “Certified Partner” by 
Interface Solutions Inc., for its commitment 
to provide 100% Asbestos-free and 100% 
Solvent-free gasket materials.
CTP es reconocido como “Socio Certificado” de 
Interface Solutions, Inc. por su compromiso de 
proveer material de empaquetaduras 100% libres 
de asbestos y solventes.
CTP    moves    into    its    new    state-of-the-art    
headquarters, with three stories of office space 
totaling 90,000 sq. Ft., two levels of warehouse 
space  totaling  approximately  380,000  sq.  Ft,  
and  the  second  largest  solar  panel  roof  in  
South Florida.
CTP se muda a su nueva sede, con tres pisos de 
espacio para oficinas con un total de 90 000 ft
2
, 
dos niveles de espacio de almacenamiento con un 
total de aproximadamente 380 000 pies cuadrados 
y el segundo techo de paneles solares más grande 
del sur de Florida.
The  expansion  to  our  Free  Trade  Zone,  now  
boasts over 50,000 sq ft., allowing us to continue 
offering  our  customers  in  over  150  countries  
maximum pricing benefits and savings while also 
retaining our flexibility and increasing our global 
logistics efficiency.
La expansión de nuestra Zona Franca que ahora 
cuenta con más de 50,000 pies cuadrados, lo que 
nos permite continuar ofreciendo a nuestros clientes 
en más de 150 países los máximos beneficios y 
ahorros en precios, al mismo tiempo aumentamos 
nuestra eficiencia logística global.
20202021
We  acquired  a  new  CNC  digital  knife  cutting  
system  for  our  gasket  production!  Less  waste,  
more precision, and the same USA-made quality. 
Our  gasket  material  received  a  fresh  upgrade  
and is now CTP Branded! We’ve partnered with 
Interface to bring a new look to our gaskets. It’s 
the same quality you’ve come to know and trust.
Modernizamos la producción de juntas con un nuevo 
sistema  de  corte  CNC.    Mayor  precisión,  menos  
residuos  y  la  calidad  Made  in  USA  de  siempre.    
Además, nuestras juntas ahora usan material CTP de 
Interface.
2023
Celebrating 45 Years of Commitment, Innovation, 
and   Trust.   From   humble   beginnings,   Costex   
Tractor  Part  has  grown  globally  while  staying  
true  to  our  core  values.  This  milestone  reflects  
the  dedication  and  passion  of  our  employees,  
customers, suppliers, and partners. 
Celebrando  45  Años  de  Compromiso,  Innovación  
y  Confianza.  Desde  humildes  comienzos,  Costex  
Tractor Parts ha crecido globalmente manteniéndose 
fiel  a  nuestros  valores  fundamentales.  Este  hito  
refleja la dedicación y pasión de nuestros empleados, 
clientes, proveedores y socios.

2008
CTP is named “Business of the Year” by South 
Florida Business Journal and Regions Bank.
CTP es nombrada “Empresa del año” por South 
Florida Business Journal y Regions Bank.
2007
A new distribution center is opened in Dallas, 
TX to serve the Central and West Coast regions 
of the U.S. Totaling over 220,000 sq.ft. of 
warehouse space.
Se abre un nuevo centro de distribución en 
Dallas, TX con el propósito de abastecer 
rápidamente las regiones Pacificas y Centrales 
de los Estados Unidos. Ahora con 220.000 ft2 
de almacenamiento.
2011
CTP becomes an ISO 9001-2008 Certified 
Company.
CTP es certificada por ISO  9001-2008.
CTP Launches CTPTV.
CTP inaugura CTPTV.
CTP acquires more warehouse space, for a total 
of over 400,000 ft2 (37,000 m2).
CTP adquiere más espacio de almacén, por un 
total de más de 400.000 ft2 (37.000 m2).
1996
Costex proves continuous growth by occupying 
a larger facility in front of one of South Florida’s 
busiest highways, with over 50,000 sq. ft. of 
warehouse space.
Costex muestra su crecimiento continuo 
adquiriendo una bodega más amplia  frente a 
una de las autopistas más grandes. Ahora con 
50.000 ft2 de almacenamiento.
1990
Costex Tractor Parts participated in its first trade 
show in Miacon.
Costex Tractor Parts participa en su primera feria 
en Miacon.
1998
CTP brand is trademarked throughout the world.
CTP brand is trademarked throughout the world.
2017
CTP  launches  a  new  website  with  easy  access  
from  all  mobile  devices  and  compatible  with  all  
browsers. Ordering and finding parts also became 
conveniently easier and user friendly on our CTP 
online store, 24 hours a day, 7 days a week!
CTP estrena nueva web de fácil acceso desde todos 
los dispositivos móviles y compatible con todos los 
navegadores. Pedir y encontrar repuestos también 
se volvió convenientemente más fácil y fácil de usar 
en nuestra tienda en línea CTP, ¡las 24 horas del día, 
los 7 días de la semana!
2012
CTP formed CTP Boxes & Packaging. Thus 
providing a one-stop shop to our customers for 
their packaging solutions.
CTP creó a CTP Boxes and Packaging, para 
proporcionar a nuestros clientes soluciones de 
empaque.

offering  our  customers  in  over  150  countries  
maximum pricing benefits and savings while also 
retaining our flexibility and increasing our global 
logistics efficiency.
La expansión de nuestra Zona Franca que ahora 
cuenta con más de 50,000 pies cuadrados, lo que 
nos permite continuar ofreciendo a nuestros clientes 
en más de 150 países los máximos beneficios y 
ahorros en precios, al mismo tiempo aumentamos 
nuestra eficiencia logística global.
20202021
We  acquired  a  new  CNC  digital  knife  cutting  
system  for  our  gasket  production!  Less  waste,  
more precision, and the same USA-made quality. 
Our  gasket  material  received  a  fresh  upgrade  
and is now CTP Branded! We’ve partnered with 
Interface to bring a new look to our gaskets. It’s 
the same quality you’ve come to know and trust.
Modernizamos la producción de juntas con un nuevo 
sistema  de  corte  CNC.    Mayor  precisión,  menos  
residuos  y  la  calidad  Made  in  USA  de  siempre.    
Además, nuestras juntas ahora usan material CTP de 
Interface.

customers, suppliers, and partners.

de 25.000 ft2.

Turbochargers
   
TURBOCHARGERS
our Turbochargers are designed to exacting standards, engineered with the best materials, and carefully assembled 
by hand. 
our high-quality compressor wheels are machined from high-density 
354 aluminum, which is stronger and 
has a higher tolerance for rotational speed than conventional turbocharger compressor wheels.
These special 354 alloy compressor wheels allow our turbochargers to deliver superior performance while operating 
at a cooler temperature over conventional turbocharger.

AFTERCOOLERS
cTP  brand  aftercooler  units  efficiently  cool  compressed  air  before  it  
enters the engine’s cylinders. This cooling process increases air density, 
allowing  for  more  effective  
fuel  combustion.  as  a  result,  engine  power  
and  performance  are  enhanced.  cTP’s  aftercoolers  are  engineered  to  
consistently deliver cooling efficiency, contributing to the overall reliability 
and longevity of engines across various applications.

BEARINGS 
For over 20 years, CTP has been an authorized distributor for nTn bearings. nTn bearings are among the 
most efficient, reliable, and high-quality products in the bearing industry. 
at  CTP,  we  have  a  wide  range  of  nTn  bearings  in  stock.  Most  nTn  and  all  bower
®
  Tapered,  Cylindrical,  
and spherical roller bearings feature case-carburized components. rings and rollers are made from case-
hardened alloy steel to provide superior fatigue life and reliability. 

bearings

8D413714g, 14H, 14H na, 14M
CTP Filament Wound Plastic self-Lubricating Composite bearings meet the need for high load, self-lubricating bearings that provide 
low wear rates in a wide variety of applications. Our composite bearings combine the excellent lubricating properties of filled PTFe 
with the high strength and stability of an oriented glass fiber wound structure.
They employ a tough, high strength composite structure consisting of epoxy-impregnated, wound glass fibers oriented to provide 
the  radial  and  axial  strength  required  to  suppor
t  high  static  and  dynamic  bearing  loads.  CTP  Composite  bearings  are  specially  
designed to withstand static loads of approximately 61,000 Psi and 20,000 Psi under dynamic loading. They can also resist an 
impressive temperature range of -100°C to +160°C. 
Typical Applications:Features:
3   Steering linkages
3   Hydraulic cylinder pivots
3   King pin bearings
3   Boom lifts, scissor lifts
3   Cranes, hoists, lift gates
3   Backhoes, trenchers
3   Skid steers loaders, front-
end loaders
3   High load capacity
3   Excellent shock and misalignment 
resistance
3   Excellent contamination resistance
3   Very good friction and wear properties
3   Good chemical resistance

BELTS & 
HOSES
Made  from  premium  quality  rubber  compounds,  CtP  V-Belts  are  
engineered  to  run  maintenance  free  to  keep  your  equipment  operating  
without re-tensioning. 
No other belt is manufactured with the same type of material or with the
 
uniformity of our product, which allows for superior tensile strength and 
consistent performance.

BRAKING & 
FRICTION
the safety of your equipment’s braking system is critical. 
ctP  offers  a  complete  line  of  reliable  braking  parts  to  
ensure your machine operates safely and efficiently. 
We  carry  parts  for  everything  you  need  to  maintain  
or  repair  a  complete  braking  system,  from  hoses  and  
linings to drums, shoes and all components in between.

Part numbers are used for reference purposes only.

ctP air compressors are designed for use on Heavy Duty 
Vehicle air brake applications. Every single component is held 
to exacting specifications. With a ctP air compressor, you get a 
product that has proven their reliability and efficiency over and 
over in demanding heavy duty and industrial applications.

CABIN & 
ACCESSORIES
cTP’s range of cabin accessories has been developed 
by  our  experts  over  four  decades,  to  ensure  that  
equipment  is  designed  to  improve  operator  comfort
  
and reduce fatigue. We carry everything from patented 
technology   seats   to   cabin   glasses   that   provide   
excellent  visibility.  With  the  latest  in  technological  
advancements,    
cTP    provides    the    best-in-class
    
solutions for your operations.

ENGINE OIL FILLER CAPS
Do not risk engine damage from debris entering your 
engine through the oil cap. cTP oil filling caps create 
a  positive  seal  that  cannot  be  bounced  or  jarred  
loose.  The  tight  seal  virtually  locks  out  moisture,  
dirt, rust, and other damaging contaminants.

COOLING 
SYSTEM
the  cooling  system  is  critical  for  the  performance  
of   your   equipment.   the   system   needs   proper   
maintenance   to   function   efficiently   and   remove   
excess heat from the engine.
C
tP  Cooling  system  Parts  and  components  are  
engineered, manufactured, and tested thoroughly to 
ensure  
the  engine  on  your  equipment  consistently  
operates at the proper temperature.

WATER PUMP IMPELLERS FOR KOMATSU
®
RUBBER IMPELLERS FOR MARINE WATER PUMPS
For marine operations, reliability is paramount, and our marine Auxiliary sea Water Pumps deliver 
just that. Designed to withstand the toughest conditions of the open sea, our pumps provide a 
consistent and efficient flow of cooling water to vital shipboard systems. With robust construction 
and a commitment to performance, our pumps ensure smooth sailing and peace of mind. Don’t 
compromise  on  your  vessel’s  safety  and  efficiency  –  trust  in  our  marine  Auxiliary  sea  Water  
Pumps to keep your operations afloat. sail smarter, choose CtP.

to  performance,  our  pumps  ensure  smooth  sailing  and  peace  of  mind.  Don’t  compromise  on  your  
vessel’s safety and efficiency – trust in our 
marine Auxiliary sea Water Pumps to keep your operations 
afloat. sail smarter, choose CtP.

The  primary  role  of  the  Air  Conditioning  Compressor  is  to  compress  and  circulate  
the refrigerant to the condenser, facilitating the absorption of heat from the system. 
Regarded  as  the  central  component  of  the  air  conditioning  (A/C)  system,  it  plays  
a  pivotal  role  in  its  overall  functionality.  Our  CTP  Air  Conditioning  Compressors  are  
designed to ensure the continual and efficient operation of your system.

TERMINAL CONNECTOR 
KITS 
DEUTSCH™ DT SERIES
DEUTSCH™ DT SERIES CONNECTORS
Deutsch™ DT are an environmentally-sealed connectors designed 
specifically  for  cable  to  cable  applications.  These  connectors  
provide  an  excellent  connection  for  signal  level  circuits  in  harsh  
environmental  conditions,  where  even  a  small  degradation  in  
connection may be critical.
The CTP Terminal Connector Kits come conveniently packed in a 
special protective suitcase.
Part No. 1753700
FeaturesHD20
Number of pieces386
Durability
No electrical or mechanical defects after 100 cycles of 
engagement or disengagement.
Moisture & 
Corrosion 
Resistance
Thermoplastic (-550 C to + 1250 C rated) housings 
and silicone seals allow the connector to withstand 
conditions of extreme temperature and moisture.
Fluid Resistance
Properly wired and mated connection will withstand 
immersion under three feet of water without loss of 
electronic qualities or leakage.
Vibration
No unlocking or unmating and exhibits no mechanical 
or physical damage after vibration level testing
Typical applications
The chassis, in the cab, under the hood, on the engine 
and the transmission.
DEUTSCH™ HD20 SERIES 
CONNECTOR
The  Deutsch™  HD  (Heavy  Duty)  Connector  series  was  developed  
with  the  heavy-duty  equipment  and  off  highway  industry  in  mind.  HD  
Series  connectors  are  a  thermoplastic  cylindrical  coupling  that  offers  
arrangements  from  3  to  9  cavities  for  heavy-duty  applications.  These  
connectors  are  easy  to  install,  environmentally  sealed  and  compact  in  
size. The simplicity of the HD Series Connectors help reduce assembly 
difficulty, maintenance time, and are built to meet industry standards to 
provide sustainability in demanding environments.
FeaturesHD20
Durability
No electrical or mechanical defects after 100 cycles of 
engagement or disengagement.
Moisture & 
Corrosion 
Resistance
Water does not penetrate seals when submerged in 3 
feet of water. No evidence of corrosion after exposure 
to 48 hours of salt spray testing.
Fluid Resistance
Connector show no damage when exposed to most 
fluids used in industrial applications.
Vibration
Maintains continuity and exhibits no mechanical or 
physical damage during or while subject to vibration.
Typical applications
High current high current connections such as 
solenoids, relays and switches.
† To ensure proper electrical performance, contact terminals must be crimped using crimping tool 
Part No. 1U5804, which needs to be ordered separately. See page 154 for more information.
DEUTSCH™ is a trademark used by TE Connectivity family of companies.

DIESEL ENGINE 
COMPONENTS
CTP  engine  Parts  are  designed  and  manufactured  
to  work  hard  as  an  integrated  system.  Continuous  
improvement  in  our  engineering  and  manufacturing  
ensures  that  our  customers  receive  the  best  quality  
products available in the market.
We  aim  to  constantly  innovate  and  change  how  the  
industry looks at replacement parts. 

Diesel

253
Costex Tractor Parts Copyright © 2025. All rights reserved.Part numbers are used for reference purposes only.
   
Designed for use in high mileage in-frame rebuilds, CTP Wet 
liners are manufactured to meet and surpass stringent design 
specifications.
  A  wet  liner  has  no  supporting  bore  str
ucture  and  it  is  held  
in  place  by  the  flange,  the  flange  has  to  withstand  and  
endure  continuous  bending  and  flexing  forces.  To  overcome  
these  stresses  all  CTP  liners  receive  a  Deep  Pressure  Roll  
burnishing  on  the  radius  directly  below  the  flange.  This  
process  strengthens  the  flange  area  by  more  than  50%  and  reduces  metal  
fatigue,  preventing  liner  fractures.  The  liners  are  induction  hardened  to  
decrease premature surface wear. All CTP liners receive a special coating to 
minimize cavitation damage and resist corrosion. 
Diseñadas para reparaciones en vehículos de alto millaje, las camisas CTP 
están  fabricadas  para  cumplir  y  sobrepasar  las  especificaciones  de  diseño  
más estrictas. 
las camisas húmedas no tienen una estructura de soporte y
 
se mantienen en su lugar por la brida, la cual tiene que soportar fuerzas de 
flexión.  Para  asegurarnos  que  las  camisas  CTP  aguantan  estas  tensiones,  
estas son sometidas a un proceso de pulido profundo en el radio directamente 
debajo de la brida. 
este proceso fortalece el área de la brida en más de un 
50% y reduce la fatiga del metal, evitando así las fracturas de la camisa. las 
camisas pasan por un tratamiento de inducción para disminuir el desgaste 
prematuro de la superficie. Todas las camisas CTP tienen un recubrimiento 
especial para reducir al mínimo el daño por cavitación y resistir la corrosión.
Liners (Camisas)
CTP Crankshafts are made out of forged 
steel,   for   strength   and   durability.   The   
forging process allows for the continuity of 
material grain flow which assists in the transmission of stresses for maximum 
strength  and  reliability.    All  crankshafts  are  balanced  to  perfection,  both  
statically and dynamically to provide a smooth and vibration free operation.
los  cigüeñales  CTP  están  hechos  de  acero  forjado  para  proporcionar  alta  
calidad y resistencia. 
el proceso de la forja permite la continuidad del grano 
del material, asistiendo la transmisión de las tensiones para ofrecer máxima 
resistencia y confiabilidad. Todos los cigüeñales se balancean a la perfección, 
tanto  estática  como  dinámicamente  para  proporcionar  una  operación  suave  
y libre de vibración.
Crankshaft  (Cigüeñales)
CTP    New    Replacement    Connecting    Rods    
are   machined   from   high-tensile   forged   steel   
for   high   durability.   With   increased   strength   
and   a   lightweight   design,   these   connecting   
rods  improve  strength  more  than  any  other  
replacement  offerings.  CTP  Connecting  Rods  are  an  economically  priced  
alternative to the time and expense involved in salvaging and reworking used 
connecting rods.
 
las bielas de reemplazo CTP están diseñadas con acero forjado para ofrecer 
una  gran  resistencia.  Con  el  aumento  de  la  fuerza  y  su  diseño  ligero,  estas  
bielas brindan más resistencia que cualquier otra ofrecida en el mercado de 
accesorios. las bielas CTP son una alternativa al original con mejores precios 
para sus reparaciones.
Rods  (Bielas)
CTP   Aluminum   Pistons   are   manufactured   out   of   
hypereutectic  aluminum  with  a  special  heat  treatment  
that modifies and improves the grain structure for added 
strength and durability. The aluminum hypereutectic alloy 
provides  good  wear  resistance  due  to  its  extreme  hardness.  The  unique  
characteristics of this alloy provides the piston with exceptional high strength 
and stiffness that reduces scuffing, while retaining dimension consistencies 
during  thermal  expansions  therefore  improving  power,  fuel  economy  and  
service life.
los  pistones  CTP  están  fabricados  de  aluminio  hipereutéctico  con  un  
tratamiento térmico especial que modifica y mejora la estructura para brindar 
mayor  resistencia  y  durabilidad.  
la  aleación  de  aluminio  hipereutéctico  
ofrece  buena  resistencia  al  desgaste  debido  a  su  extrema  dureza.  las  
características  únicas  que  esta  aleación  proporciona  al  pistón  con  alta  
resistencia y rigidez reduce el desgaste abrasivo y conser
va las dimensiones 
consistentes durante las expansiones térmicas, por tanto, mejora la potencia, 
la economía de combustible y su vida útil.
Piston (Pistón)
CTP  engine  Bearings  are  constructed  of  
multiple  layers,  comprised  of  different  
metal  alloys.  The  most  common  is  the  Tri-metal  bearing;  composed  of  a  
steel backing, followed by a copper plated layer with a lead-tin alloy sur
face. 
The  Bi-metal  bearing  has  a  steel  backing  with  an  aluminum  bearing  alloy.  
These  bearing  composites  are  engineered  for  durability,  conformability  and  
embeddability,  while  providing  high  strength  and  high  wear  resistance.  The  
aluminum  alloy  bearings  are  designed  to  increase  thermal  transfer  to  draw  
damaging heat away from critical surfaces. 
los cojinetes están fabricados con múltiples capas compuestas de diferentes 
aleaciones metálicas.  el más común es el cojinete Tri-metal; compuesto de 
un  soporte  de  acero,  seguido  de  una  capa  de  cobre  con  una  superficie  de  
aleación  de  plomo.  
el  cojinete  Bi-metal  tiene  una  capa  de  acero  con  una  
aleación  de  aluminio.  estos  materiales  compuestos  están  diseñados  para  
proporcionar una larga durabilidad y alta resistencia al desgaste. los cojinetes 
de  aleación  de  aluminio  están  diseñados  para  aumentar  la  transferencia  
tér
mica para mantener el calor dañino lejos de superficies críticas.
Engine Bearings  (Cojinetes)
CTP  steel  compression  rings  come  with  several  
types  of  coatings;  Moly,  Chrome  and  Ceramic  
PVD Coatings. These coatings offer higher tensile 
strength   and   greater   hardness,   while   offering   
improved  stress  resistance  and  durability.  Our  secondary  compression  
rings  are  manufactured  out  of  non  heat  treated  grey  cast  iron  for  better  
conformability  that  improves  oil  control.  Our  low  tension  oil  rings  reduce  
friction and cylinder wear for longer service life.
Anillos  de  pistón  CTP  están  hechos  de  varios  tipos  de  recubrimientos:  
molibdeno,  cromo  y  PVD  de  cerámica.  
estos  recubrimientos  ofrecen  una  
mayor  resistencia  a  la  fricción,  una  mejor  dureza,  mejor  durabilidad  y  
resistencia al estrés. 
los anillos secundarios 
se fabrican de hierro de fundido 
para una mejor adaptabilidad mejorando el control de aceite. Nuestros anillos 
de aceite de baja tensión reducen la fricción y el desgaste del cilindro para 
ofrecer una vida útil más larga.
Piston Rings  (Anillos de Pistón)
CTP valves are manufactured under strict guidelines and design parameters 
to  ensure  a  reliable  product.  The  proper  type  of  material  and  design  is  
crucial  to  the  valve  operating  performance  and  reliability.  Our  valves  are  
manufactured  from  specific  alloys  depending  on  the  application.  some  of  
these specialty alloys include 
stellite™ and inconel™ two superalloys that 
are  used  for  their  outstanding  hardness  and  toughness  and  also  for  their  
oxidation and corrosion resistant properties, that are well suited for service 
in extreme high temperature environments subjected to pressure like today’s 
Diesel engines.
las válvulas CTP están fabricadas bajo parámetros de diseño estrictos para 
garantizar un producto confiable. 
el uso del material y diseño adecuado es 
crucial  para  el  rendimiento  operativo  de  la  válvula.  Nuestras  válvulas  se  
fabrican  de  aleaciones  específicas  dependiendo  de  la  aplicación.  Algunas  
de  estas  aleaciones  especiales  incluyen  stellite™  y  inconel™  dos  super  
aleaciones que se utilizan para lograr su dureza y resistencia a la oxidación y 
la cor
rosión, bien adaptados para el servicio en ambientes de temperaturas 
extremas y sometidos a la presión de los motores Diesel de hoy.
Valves  (Válvulas)

CUSTOM ENGINES
Two of the most popular and versatile engines in heavy equipment are 
engines 3304 and 3306. For the past 30 years, hundreds of thousands 
of  these  engines  have  been  produced  and  are  still  in  service.  CTP  
offers these two workhorse engines at a great value.
A   new   CTP   engine   offers   several   advantages   over   a   re-
manufactured  or  used  engine.  One  of  the  key  benefits  is  time,  
often  we  can  assemble  a  custom  made  engine  in  just  a  few  
short days, this means getting your equipment back into service 
quicker.  Another  key  factor  is  that  the  engine  contains  all  new  
components that will last a very long time.
Description 
PCPRE-COMBUSTION (Pre-Combustion type cylinder head)
DIDIRECT INJECTION (Direct injection type cylinder head)
SBSHORT BLOCK (Complete engine assembly, no cylinder head no oil pump)
MBMEDIUM BLOCK (complete engine assembly, w/cylinder head no oil pump)
LBLONG BLOCK (Complete engine assembly, w/cylinder head & oil pump)
long block engines come completely assembled with NeW:

LINERS
WET LINERSCTP wet liners are manufactured for faster Brake-
in and durability. When rebuilding a Diesel engine that utilizes wet 
liners, machining is not required as they fit into a standard bore size. 
Replacing a Wet liner is a fairly simple “slip fit” installation, however 
liner projection is critical and must be carefully measured.
CTP 
Wet liners feature:
• Roll burnished under-the-flange 
radius provides superior 
       strength and prevents fractures.• 
 induction heat-treated high-grade steel or gray iron construction offers 
greater strength and durability.•
  Precision manufacturing 
ensures perfectly round bores 
and correct cross hatch 
pattern for quick Brake-in and 
proper ring seating.
Part No. Engine Model
12382063508, 3512, 3516
12607391693, D343

s6D140, s6D140e, sA12V140, sA6D140, sA6D140A,

DRY ENGINE LINER
DRY LINERS / REPAIR SLEEVES
There are several types of dry liners and repair sleeves;Flanged 
dry liner, this is a slip type fit, where machining of the block is not required, the flange holds the liner in 
place, the inside bore is finished and honed. 
Interference fit dry liners; these liners must be pressed in place after removing the old liner from the 
block, some come prefinished and honed.
Repair sleeves, where the block must be bored to accept this type of sleeve, these are interference fit 
and require pressing, repair sleeves do not come with finished or honed 
iD. *
CTP Dry liners feature:
•    High-grade steel or gray iron construction for durability and strength.
•
    Precise and uniform outside dimension for ease of installation.
•    Pre-finished bore liners have accurate cross hatch patter
n finish for quick Brake-in and proper

PISTON RINGS
CTP Piston Rings are technically optimized with:
• Advanced surface finish utilizing chrome plating, gas nitriding, spray 
coating and ceramic coating
• superior base material such as gray cast iron, ductile cast iron and 
stainless steel
• High precision machining
The benefits:
1. excellent sealing performance will dramatically reduce blow-by 
gas and oil consumption.
2. High anti-wear and Brakeage performance will assure you a longer 
part-life span.
CTP Piston Rings are constructed to optimize power output, decrease engine friction and greatly reduce blow-by gas and oil consumption. Our piston 
ring sets are designed for the latest engines, with precise tolerances, high manufacturing quality and materials that maximize engine performance. CTP 
Piston Rings have the technology and innovative product design to meet your needs.

assembled    with    all-new    components,    
eliminating the need for specialty tools like 
ring expanders and compressors. Designed 
for   efficiency,   these   kits   ensure   faster,   
hassle-free  installation—saving  time  and  
labor costs.

16141123406, 3406C, 3406e
375, 375 l, 5080, 578, 583R, D8N, D8R, 
D8R ii
The  oil  pump  is  the  heart  of  the  lubrication  system.  They  are  vital  to  
protecting  engine  components  from  frictional  wear  and  overheating.  Oil  
lubricates  moving  engine  parts  to  allow  them  to  operate  smoothly  with  
less  resistance  and  friction.  A  well  lubricated  engine  increases  the  odds  
of  a  longer  service  life  from  its  parts.  The  oil  pump  also  helps  disperse  
engine heat by providing a steady flow of oil and lubricating engine parts 
as they work and carrying heat away from the combustion area. CTP oil 
pumps ensure sufficient lubrication and smooth oil circulation.
ENGINE OIL 
PUMPS

CYLINDER 
HEADS
CTP  cylinder  heads  are  CNC  machined  to  exact  specifications  using  
premium materials and state-of-the-art manufacturing to ensure the quality 
of  every  casting.  CTP  Cylinder  Heads  are  available  as  budget-friendly  
bare Cylinder Heads for repairs, where re-usable parts are swapped over 
from  the  original  cylinder  head.  We  offer  a  complete  inventory  of  new  
replacement valvetrain parts to complete the job. 
CTP Manufactured Diesel Cylinder Heads for your equipment

CYLINDER HEADS (CONT.)
ASSEMBLED  
CYLINDER HEADS
CTP also offers complete Cylinder Heads fully built, ready to install. The 
heads are assembled using blueprinting methods; where all the parts 
and components are checked for proper fit prior to assembly. All of our 
cylinder heads are checked for dimensional accuracy, straightness and 
surface finish. The valve seats are micro finished and the assembled 
cylinder  heads  are  vacuum  leak  tested  to  assure  a  positive  valve  to  
seat seal.

C925278032418383
C12, 3176B, 3176C, 319615706721570671
C15, C27, C32, 3508B49071984907199
Today’s trends are shifting towards higher performance, fuel economy, natural 
resource conservation, and the introduction of special blended fuels. All these 
pose a special demand on Diesel engines, especially on the exhaust valves.  
One of the key requirements of exhaust valve materials is oxidation resistance. 
Nimomic
®
  80A  alloy,  a  nickel-base,  high  temperature  alloy,  containing  a  
high  percentage  of  chromium,  is  characterized  by  excellent  high  oxidation  
resistance  and  super  resistance  to  fatigue  under  very  high  temperature  
conditions.
CTP’s  new  High  Performance  Nimomic
®
  80A  super  alloy  Intake  &  Exhaust  
Valves  offer  rugged  reliability,  extended  life  and  durability.  This  technology  
allows us to provide the highest level of performance and reliability for your 
engine.

ENGINE OIL COOLER COVERS
HEAVY DUTY 
ENGINE OIL PANS 
CTP  has  launched  a  new  line  of  replacement  oil  pans  for  heavy-duty  equipment  engines,  offering  
superior durability and performance. Our oil pans are constructed from high-grade materials that resist 
corrosion and withstand harsh operational conditions. Engineered for a perfect fit, they ensure effective 
oil containment and management, reducing the risk of leaks and enhancing engine lubrication. With their 
robust design, the new oil pans help extend engine life and maintain optimal performance, making them 
essential upgrades for heavy-duty machinery. Their ease of installation and compatibility with various 
engine models further add to their appeal for operators and maintenance professionals seeking reliable 
and efficient solutions.

FILTERS 
FILTERS 
The role of the filters (oil, fuel, air, and hydraulic) is to prevent dust, dirt, and debris from entering the systems 
of your machine. Contaminants can cause poor performance and diminish the operating life of your equipment. 
CTP Filters are designed for maximum protection and increase in productivity, ultimately saving on the operating 
cost of your equipment.
At CTP, we offer a complete range of high-quality filters and separation products to meet your maintenance needs.

AIR FILTER INDICATORS
Knowing when to change the air filters of your machine is a critical part of your machines service. Stop changing the air filters of your machine 
too late or too soon by using Air filter indicators.
Air filters indicators:
 üHelp you reduce filter cost by reducing filter changes when 
 working under low dust working conditions.
 üIndicate the remaining lifetime of your filter.
 üHelp improve engine performance.

FUEL INJECTION
FUEL 
INJECTION
The Diesel fuel injection system is a critical component 
of  any  Diesel  engine.  CTP  fuel  injection  parts  are  
crafted  from  premium  materials  and  engineered  with  
precision to meet strict quality standards.  
Our Injectors and Nozzles are produced using state-of-
the-art EDM technology, laser-optic electronic systems, 
and  rigorous  testing  processes.  This  ensures  precise  
fuel   injection,   maximized   durability,   and   seamless   
compatibility with your equipment’s system.

Advantages of CTP Diesel Power™:
FUEL  ADDITIVE
Water is welcome almost everywhere except in your Diesel fuel. Water in Diesel fuel severely damages injectors, 
corrodes tanks and fosters the growth of bacteria. Our highly concentrated Diesel Power™ is also an all-in-one 
package which contains lubricity. Increase your engine’s performance by giving Diesel Power™ a place in your 
engine today.
Part No.Description Engine Model

 Dispersa totalmente el aguapara una combustión completa.
 üContains lubricity additives. 
 Contiene aditivos de lubricación.
 üContains cetane improvers.  Previene la acumulación de ceras  
 y substancias gelatinosas.
 üEliminates the formation of algae and harmful acids. 
 Elimina la formación de algas ácidos dañinos.
 üDecarbonizes combustion chamber. 
 Decarboniza la cámara de combustión.
 üCleans injection systems. Limpia el sistema de inyección.

GOVERNORS
 üReduces exhaust smoke. Reduce el escape de humo.
 üImproves fuel economy.  Mejora el ahorro de combustible.

GROUND 
ENGAGING TOOLS
Top-quality  ground  engaging  tools  make  a  big  difference  in  how  well  your  machine  performs.  CTP  offers  top-quality  ground  
engaging  tools  for  earthmoving  equipment  such  as  Loaders,  Excavators,  Backhoe,  Dozers,  Rippers,  Motor  Graders,  Paving  
Products, and Scrapers. We are proud to offer high-quality ground engaging tools with the latest designed shapes for outstanding 
performance for various applications.
Whether you are in the business of construction, excavation, mining, trenching, or any other earthmoving enterprise, the value you 
demand can be found in CTP ground engaging tools. 

Costex Tractor Parts Copyright © 2025. All rights reserved.

399
TIP SELECTION GUIDE
WHAT TO CONSIDER WHEN YOU’RE CHOOSING TIPS BUCKET
ALL CTP TIPS ARE MADE FROM ONE OF TWO SPECIAL STEEL ALLOYS:
F2, which resists softening in applications that generate high heat.
F4,  which is through-hardened to provide consistently low wear rates throughout the life of the tip.
TIPS COME IN MANY DIFFERENT SHAPES AND SIZES, 
YOU MIGHT THINK IT TAKES AN EXPERT TO PICK THE 
RIGHT ONE. NOT SO. IT CAN ALL BE REDUCED TO A 
FEW SIMPLE GUIDELINES.
STRENGTH:The ability to withstand 
digging and penetrating shocks as well as 
high Brakeout forces.
PENETRATION:The ability to 
penetrate tough material, when it’s 
tightly compacted, rocky or frozen
WEAR LIFE:The ability to withstand 
wearing, scouring, and abrasive action 
of the material being handled
PENETRATION:SHORT:LONG:HEAVY DUTY LONG:
•  Use in densely compacted 
material such as clay.
• Gives maximum penetration.
• Self-sharpening.
• 
 Use in high-impact and  
pry-out work such as rock.
• Extremely strong.
•  Use in most general applications 
where Brakeage is not a problem.
• Extremely strong.
•  Use in general loading 
and excavation work.
• 
 Provides extended wear 
and strength.
HEAVY DUTY ABRASION:HEAVY DUTY LONG:HEAVY DUTY  
PENETRATION:
ROCK CHISEL:
•  Use when working in sand, 
gravel and shot rock.
• Maximum wear material.

9W4551CENTERLINE SHORT9N42456Y1205D11
6Y3552PENETRATOR INTERMEDIATE9N42456Y1205D11
Ripper  teeth  are  used  in  very  hostile  environments,  making  it  necessary  to  utilize  a  
quality  product.  CTP  Branded  ripper  teeth  provide  rapid  penetration  and  aggressive  
ripping  angle,  along  with  increased  impact  resistance.  Penetration  teeth  are  used  in  
conditions  where  soil  penetration  is  difficult.  Centerline  teeth  are  used  in  conditions  
where penetration does not present a problem.

CUTTING  EDGES
CTP blades and end bits are manufactured from boron steel and are heat treated, 
quenched and tempered to accomplish the desired performance. The unique 
combination of the materials provides high strength, toughness and impact 
resistance with excellent wear resistance.

CTP Heavy Duty Buckets are specially engineered for excavating in the harshest conditions. Designed for digging in various materials, including dirt, 
clay, rock, and high abrasive applications. The Q355 high-strength steel shell ncreases strength for supporting stress and heavy loads.With a yield 
strength of 345 MPa (megapascal) and a tensile strength of 450 Mpa. Q355 steel offers outstanding longevity, performance, and stability.

CTP  KOMATSU

  Heavy  Duty  Buckets  are  specially  engineered  for  tough  conditions.  Designed  for  digging  in  various  
materials, including dirt, clay, and rock, as well as high abrasive applications such as asphalt and concrete. The narrow 
18”  models  are  perfect  for  excavating  in  areas  that  are  inaccessible  to  wide  buckets.  Extra-thick  sides  and  reinforcing  
gussets, give you outstanding strength at an economical price. The Q355 high-strength steel offers outstanding longevity, 
performance, and stability.

•  Manufactured out of Q355 high strength steel

• Bottom wear pads on HD models

 Optional Wear Buttons and Chocky Bars Available

Costex Tractor Parts Copyright © 2025. All rights reserved.
GROUND ENGAGING TOOLS
Part numbers are used for reference purposes only.
445
CTP  Chocky  Bars  and  Wear  Buttons  provide  maximum  protection  against  high  abrasion  for  your  excavator,  shovel,  or  loader  bucket.  
Wear bars are easily cut, formed and welded onto contoured surfaces to provide that extra layer of protection against wear and impact 
under the harshest conditions. Wear buttons can be arranged and welded in a variety of ways to provide extra protection to smaller areas.
With a variety of shapes and sizes, these products are easily installed to high wear areas resulting in reduced maintenance and downtime. 
CTP Wear products Extend the life of your equipment bucket.
CHOCKY BARS
• Easy to cut for customized protection
• Easy to bend for contoured surfaces
• Available in many sizes
WEAR BUTTONS
• Ideal for smaller areas
• Requires less welding time
• Available in many sizes
CHOCKY BARS & WEAR BUTTONS

930320NUT, SHOE
930321NUT, SHOE
HEAVY NYLON 
LOCKNUTS
Nylon insert locknuts are used where equipment vibration might 
loosen the connection. This type of locknut is regularly used 
for critical applications such as piston rod nuts for hydraulic 
cylinders. CTP heavy nylon locknuts are made of steel alloy, 
hardened to RC 28-34 and can withstand temperatures up to 
250°F! Regularly used for agricultural, mining, heavy-duty, and 
off-highway applications our heavy nylon locknuts guarantee 
strength, durability and reliability. 
Part No.Description

DIAPHRAGMS
Heavy-duty  equipment  diaphragms  are  vital  seals  in  fuel  and  hydraulic  systems,  
regulating  fluid  flow  and  pressure.  Proper  maintenance  prevents  leaks,  ensures  
efficiency, and extends equipment life, while neglect leads to downtime and safety risks.

HYDRAULIC 
SYSTEM
The Hydraulic system is a high-pressure fluid system that requires all components to work collectively. In a hydraulic system, the 
engine  drives  a  hydraulic  pump  to  transfer  high-pressure  fluid  through  control  valves  and  to  various  actuators,  which  then  move  
hydraulic cylinders and motors to do the work required by the operator. For this reason, machines rely on the system to perform 
flawlessly to run and operate at the most effective levels.
CTP considers the significance of these requirements and invests hundreds of hours into the research, development, and testing of 
all our hydraulic replacement parts. From hydraulic reservoirs to motors and cylinders, CTP carries the most extensive inventory of 
hydraulic parts in the market for your machine.

Part numbers are used for reference purposes only.
462
Costex Tractor Parts Copyright © 2025. All rights reserved.

HYDRAULIC MOTORS
HYDRAULIC 
MOTORS
Hydraulic  motors  are  mechanical  actuators;  they  convert  fluid  
pressure  into  rotational  hydraulic  energy  and  torque.  There  
are  a  few  different  types  of  hydraulic  motors.  The  main  ones,  
which are each named for the rotating component they use, are 
vane,  gear,  and  piston  hydraulic  motors.  For  the  best  results,  
CTP   manufactures   motor   components   and   main   hydraulic   
motor  enclosure  from  a  durable  steel  alloy  and  cast  iron,  that  
can  weather  both  high  operating  speeds  and  pressure.  CTP’s  
hydraulic motors are some of the best in the industry. 
 üFan speed runs independent from engine speed.
 üMore precise temperature control.
 üOn-demand cooling capability to eliminate power consumption.
 ü3 Reduced noise
 ü3 Reduced emissions

HYDRAULIC OIL FILTERS
At  CTP  we  understand  that  hydraulic  filters  are  a  critical  
component  of  the  hydraulic  system.  It  is  essential  that  they  
provide the right filtration in order to keep the system clean and 
ensure its efficiency. Our range of hydraulic filters are designed 
to provide the best protection for your hydraulic system. They 
prevent unwanted debris from clogging your system which can 
cause expensive damage and downtime. With a wide range of 
products, we can help you find the right filter for your application.

HYDRAULIC STEERING 
CONTROL UNITS
The hydraulic steering control units play an important role in the 
operator’s comfort. At CTP we ensure our steering units deliver 
perfect control in all kinds of driving conditions. 
Some of the advantages of the hydraulic steering control units are:
 üMinimize steering cost by reducing the steering linkage.
 üProvide better comfort to the operator because there is no load  
 reaction on the steering wheel.
 üOffer continuous operation with low input torque.
 üProvide a wide selection of control circuits and meter sizes.

At CTP we understand that hydraulic filters are a critical component of the hydraulic system. It is essential that they provide 
the right filtration in order to keep the system clean and ensure its efficiency. Our range of hydraulic filters are designed to 
provide the best protection for your hydraulic system. They prevent unwanted debris from clogging your system which can 
cause expensive damage and downtime. With a wide range of products, we can help you find the right filter for your application.

Power Train
POWER TRAIN
Power  train  components  must  endure  high  impact  loads  and  
frequent  changes  of  direction  and  movement.  CTP  considers  all  
of these demands by practicing testing procedures that simulate 
real-world applications.
we  constantly  improve  our  techniques  to  ensure  our  customers  
receive quality products with the best technology at a competitive 
edge  in  a  price-sensitive  market.  our  goal  is  to  provide  durable  
power train parts and maximize your machine’s productivity.

   
Costex Tractor Parts Copyright © 2025. All rights reserved.
Power Train
Part numbers are used for reference purposes only.
503
CTP   Diesel   engine   Flywheels   are   vital   components   in   engine   refurbishment,   
providing reliable performance and restoring functionality to aging or damaged diesel 
powertrains. engineered to meet oeM specifications, these flywheels ensure precise 
fitment  and  compatibility  with  a  range  of  diesel  engine  models,  facilitating  smooth  
power transmission and enhancing overall engine efficiency.

505
DRIVESHAFT YOKE 
ASSEMBLIES
Drive  shaft  yokes,  also  known  as  slip  yokes,  are  one  of  the  most  important  
components of your equipment’s drive system and allow it to operate smoothly 
when going over rough terrain. This is accomplished by allowing the drive shaft 
to  flex  and  accommodate  for  bumps  in  the  road.  The  design  makes  sure  that  
your vehicle’s drive shaft U-joint stays aligned properly so that it can continue 
operating smoothly without damage.

UNDERCARRIAGE COMPONENTS 
FOR MINI EXCAVATORS
CTP has introduced a new line of undercarriage components specifically designed for mini excavators, enhancing durability and performance. 
This  range  includes  robust  idler  wheels,  high-traction  sprockets,  and  resilient  rollers,  all  engineered  to  withstand  the  rigors  of  demanding  
construction environments. The idler wheels ensure smooth operation and reduce wear, while the sprockets are crafted for optimal power 
transmission.  The  rollers  offer  improved  stability  and  longevity,  ensuring  that  mini  excavators  can  perform  efficiently  and  reliably  across  
various  terrains.  These  components  promise  to  extend  the  lifespan  of  equipment  and  reduce  maintenance  costs,  making  them  a  valuable  
addition for operators seeking reliability and efficiency.

Costex Tractor Parts Copyright © 2025. All rights reserved.

509
TRACK FRAME & ROLLER 
GUARDS
Keep your machine in top shape with our rollers guards. essential to have installed on your 
machine, no matter what kind of terrain you’ll be working in. Designed to mount on the track 
frame, these guides help maintain the alignment and prevent the steel tracks from falling off. 
without roller guards, the likelihood of your tracks slipping or becoming misaligned increases, 
and both of those problems can lead to expensive downtime.

511
SPINDLE HOUSINGS
WHEEL SPINDLES
CTP heavy duty wheel spindles are essential components designed to 
withstand the rigorous demands of heavy machinery operations. These 
spindles  play  a  critical  role  in  supporting  the  weight  and  ensuring  the  
stability  of  Caterpillar’s  robust  construction  and  mining  equipment.  
Built from high-strength materials, CTP’s wheel spindles are engineered 
for  durability  and  longevity,  capable  of  handling  the  intense  pressures  
and   stresses   encountered   in   tough   working   environments.   Their   
precision  engineering  ensures  optimal  performance,  reducing  the  risk  
of breakdowns and enhancing the overall efficiency of the machinery.

Bevel gears and gear sets are:
 ü100% roll tested against master gears to check for proper match,  
 noise and any small imperfections that may have been created in  
 handling or heat-treating.
 üQuench pressed during heat treatment to minimize distor tion and  
 maximize close tolerances. 
GEARS
BEVEL GEARS & 
GEAR SETS
 üGrounded with a machine that uses diamond honing to remove  
 most of the distortion and imperfections created during heat  
 treatment. Ground gears are quieter and provide longer life.
 üShot peening and micro finishing are used to relieve the stress  
 created in the material of the gear during the forging, cutting and  
 heat treating processes.

aTor                        D8L, D9L, D10n
9P9517             STaTor                        966D, 966e, 966F
9w4702             STaTor                        980C, 980G, 980K, 988B
Torque Converters are an essential part of your automatic transmission. 
They  not  only  allow  your  vehicle  to  come  to  a  complete  stop  without  
stalling  the  engine,  but  also  provide  more  torque  when  accelerating  
out of a stop, ultimately, giving you more control over your machine’s 
movements. Stators are located at the center of the Torque Converter. 
They redirect the fluid returning from the turbine before it hits the pump 
again, increasing the efficiency of the Torque Converter.

Planetary drive gears must withstand the high forces of torque 
generated  by  the  engine  and  transfer  these  loads  to  move  
the  equipment.  all  CTP  swing  gears  and  final  drive  gears  are  
manufactured to precise tolerances for reliable operation. The 
manufacturing  method  includes  a  heat  treatment  process  
that  increases  bending  strength,  prevents  case  crushing  and  
provides exceptional wear resistance for a long service life.

GASKETS & 
SEALS
at CtP, we manufacture gaskets designed to endure the high pressures and temperatures of modern Diesel engines. 
as a certified partner of Interface solutions Inc., we produce 100% asbestos-free and solvent-free gaskets and kits. 
Our advanced 60,000-square-foot facility ensures the highest quality, delivering durable, reliable components with the 
value C
tP customers expect.
en CtP fabricamos juntas que soportan las altas presiones y temperaturas de los motores Diesel modernos. Como 
socios cer
tificados de Interface 
solutions Inc., producimos juntas y kits 100% libres de asbestos y solventes. Con 
tecnología avanzada y más de 60,000 pies cuadrados de producción, garantizamos calidad, durabilidad y confiabilidad 
con el valor que los clientes de CtP esperan.

ABC GASKETS PROGRAM
What  is  CTP’s  ABC  Gasket  program  about?the  aBC  
gasket kit program is designed to consolidate gasket kits and make 
it easier for the parts person to order and for the rebuilder himself to 
quickly identify and organize their vcvvvs. at the same time, they can 
be  assured  that  everything  they  need  is  included  for  each  particular  
rebuild. kits are packaged into sub kits (front set, rear set, lower set, 
etc.) inside the gasket kit box for easy identification.
¿De  qué  se  trata  “Kit  de  Empaquetaduras  ABC”  de  
CTP?
el programa de los kit de empaquetaduras aBC está diseñado 
para facilitar al cliente la orden de piezas. al mismo tiempo facilita la 
rápida identificación y organización de los sellos y juntas necesarios 
para la reconstrucción de su motor Diesel. esto asegura al cliente 
que todas las piezas  necesarias para la reconstrucción de su motor 
están incluidas en una sola caja.
¿Por  qué  comprar  un  Kit  de  Empaquetaduras  ABC  de  
CTP?
sabemos  lo  importante  que  es  para  el  cliente  mantener  las  
cosas simples y organizadas. Nosotros podemos ayudarle en este 
aspecto y al mismo tiempo le ofrecemos la confiabilidad y la calidad 
superior que viene en cada producto CtP.
Why  buy  CTP’s  ABC  Gasket  Kits?everyone  likes  to  
keep  things  simple  and  organized.  We  can  help  you  do  that  
while  offering  you  the  reliability  and  premium  quality  that  
comes with every C
tP product.

524
Costex tractor Parts Copyright © 2025. all rights reserved. Part numbers are used for reference purposes only.
gaskets & seals
The ABC Gasket Kit Program offers you the following:El programa de Kit de Empaquetaduras ABC le ofrece los 
siguientes beneficios:
1 box instead of 10 boxes.  
Todo lo que necesita en una sola caja en vez de diez.
 kits a are divided and labeled into sub-kits inside the gasket kit box for easy 
identification. 
Los Kits A se dividen y etiquetan en Sub-kits para asegurar una identificación fácil.
less shipping costs. (1 box compared to 10 boxes) 
Menos costos de envío (1 caja vs 10 cajas).
less warehouse space (1 box compared to 10 boxes).  
Ocupa menos espacio en su establecimiento (1 caja vs 10 
cajas).
Faster inventory turnover.   
Rotación de inventario más rápida.
More machine coverage with lower investment in inventory (each 
special kit covers a wide range of  serial numbers). 
Una cobertura más amplia sobre los modelos de motor con una 
inversión más baja en el inventario (Cada kit cubre una amplia 
gama de números de serie).
simplified part number system (a= , B= , C=).  
Un sistema más fácil para la identificación de números de parte 
(A=, B=, C=).
all necessary seals and gaskets are included in a kit for a particular 
rebuild (inframe, out of  frame or a head set). You won’t have to 
worry that anything is missing.  
Todos los sellos y juntas necesarios para cada reconstrucción 
están incluidos (In-frame, Out-of-Frame o el set de empaquetadura 
para la cabeza de los cilindros).
Selecting the right kit for your application / Cómo elegir el kit que necesita:
A = Out of Frame Overhaul Set
Includes all the gaskets and seals required for a complete engine overhaul / Incluye todas las 
empaquetaduras y partes necesarias para realizar una reconstrucción completa de su motor.
B = Inframe Overhaul SetIncludes all the gaskets required for an in-frame engine overhaul / Incluye todas las empaquetaduras y 
partes necesarias para realizar una reparación dentro del marco de su motor.
C = Single Cylinder Head Replacement SetIncludes all the gaskets required for the replacement of a single cylinder head on 
an engine / Incluye todas las juntas requeridas para el reemplazo de una sola culata en un motor.
Other options will be identified with the letters D or 
e. 
Otras opciones se identifican con las letras D o E.
the part number will be made up of:  CtP + engine number + consecutive number + a,B,C (D or e suffix if available).
El número de parte está compuesto de la siguiente forma: CTP + Numero de motor  + Numero consecutivo  + A, B, C (sufijo “D” o 
“E” también están disponibles).
 †Delivery time varies depending on availability of parts. El tiempo de entrega varía dependiendo de la disponibilidad de las piezas.

UNDERCARRIAGE 
/ FRAME & BODY
undercarriage parts and components work as a system to move heavy equipment in any terrain. cTP   produces 
high-quality undercarriage parts to keep your heavy machinery running productively with minimal downtime.
undercarriage parts can account 
for much of the repair investment you make over a machine’s life. For this 
reason, 
cTP offers the highest quality undercarriage replacement parts while giving customers the ability to 
obtain significant savings to reduce repairs cost on their equipment.

6K7164             950
6K7165             950
Control Gp - Bucket
The internal hardness of our new cTP Pins is thicker to ensure 
better resistance and longer life. They are manufactured out 
of chrome-moly alloy steel, and are put through an induction 
hardness procedure that makes the pin more resistant to 
extreme wear, prevents corrosion, and maximizes performance. 
We also use electroplating techniques to apply additional anti-
corrosion products and improve their overall strength
Our pins feature:
• induction Harden zone Hrc 56 min to depth 1mm
• Minimum core hardness Hrc 22 to 25
• 0.02 to 0.03mm layer of chrome coating on all surfaces of 
the pin.
• Material; 42crMo and 35crMo

PIVOT SHAFTS
SKID STEER  PINS & 
BUSHINGS
Pins  and  bushings  are  pivotal  for  the  functionality  of  skid  steers,  facilitating  smooth  
and  precise  movement.  
cTP  Pins  are  
engineered  with  durability  and  precision,  they  
withstand intense stress and friction, guaranteeing consistent performance in challenging 
environments.  
cTP  pins  undergo  meticulous  heat  treatment  to  optimize  flexibility  and  
reinforce outer shell hardness, enhancing their longevity and reliability
.

RUBBER  
TRACKS
cTP now stocks a large selection of rubber tracks for mini-excavators, compact track loaders and mini-dozers for nearly all equipment 
brands such as caT
®
, Bobcat
®
, Takeuchi
®
, John deere
®
, case
®
, Komatsu
®
, Terex
®
, 
new Holland
®
, Volvo
®
, Hyundai
®
, and JcB
®
environmental hazards, heat, and friction are the enemy when it comes to rubber track longevity. at cTP, we ensure our rubber tracks are 
manufactured from only the finest materials and specifically designed to provide excellent performance under a wide range of working 
conditions. The rubber tracks manufacturing process follows strict iSO 9001 Quality Standards.
Here are some of the several popular sizes available in stock for a large selection of machines and applications:

GREASE 
GUN KIT
Part No.Description
CTp8F9866GReAse GuN KiT
The CTP Grease Gun Kit includes:
 üA TWiN-loCK-system Grease Gun that ensures the grease reaches  
 the lubrication point to avoid dummy lubrication. 
 La grasera posee un sistema TWIN LOCK que asegura que la grasa alcance  
 el punto de lubricación perfecto para evitar una lubricación falsa.
 üTwo different high pressure hoses that connect the grease gun to the 
 lubrication point. 
 Dos mangueras de presión diferentes que conectan la grasera con el  
 punto de lubricación.
 üAn extension tube that allows you to adjust the bent connector to the 
 desire pointing direction.  
 Un tubo de extensión que permite apuntar el conector en la dirección  
       deseada.
 üAn assortment of the 5 most popular sizes of interchangeable fittings. 
 Un surtido de los 5 tamaños más populares de boquillas.
Part No.Description
7H1680GR
eAse puMp
Features and Specifications:
 üThe gauge of the sheet metal is thicker to giving optimum strength to the 
 structure of the tank.  
 El espesor del metal es mas grueso para dar más fuerza y resistencia a  
 la estructura del tanque. 
 üThe piston pump is attached to the tank by four screws and four nuts that  
 are located inside the tank to make it more resistant. 
 La bomba del pistón esta reforzada con 4 tornillos y 4 tuercas que se  
 encuentran dentro del tanque para que esté más fija.
 üequipped with rubber gaskets by the piston and by the filler cap to  
 prevent leakage.  
 Viene con juntas en la sección de la bomba de pistón y en la tapa de  
 llenado para evitar derrame.
 üpressure can go from 3000 to 5000 psi with just a few strokes. 
 La presión varía de 3000 hasta 5000 psi. 
 üincludes hose and replacement fittings. Incluye la manguera y las boquillas.
 ü20 Kgs Capacity. Capacidad de hasta 20 Kg.

TETRA GAUGE
(Performs four gauge functions)
The CTp Assortment Kits are the fast, easy, and most economical 
way to ensure you have the right part in-hand when needed. The 
kits  include  all  of  the  popular  0-Rings  (Nitrile,  Viton,  &  silicone),  
D-Rings assortments and our most requested electrical connectors 
and  lubrication  fitting  assortments.  The  kits  cover  a  multitude  of  
size and applications in a durable reusable container. The kits offer 
the same material, grade, and finish as the original, for proper fit 
and function.
